Class.name: Sample.Person
Class.Description:
This sample persistent class represents a person.

Maintenance note: This class is used by some of the bindings samples.

Index.name: ZipCode
Index.Description: Define an index for embedded object property ZipCode.

Method.name: %JSONExportToStream
Method.Description:
Serialize a JSON enabled class as a JSON document and write it to a stream.
mappingName is the name of the mapping to use for the export. The base mapping is represented by "" and is the default.

Method.name: %JSONExportToString
Method.Description:
Serialize a JSON enabled class as a JSON document and return it as a string.
mappingName is the name of the mapping to use for the export. The base mapping is represented by "" and is the default.

Property.name: SSN
Property.Description: Person's Social Security number. This is validated using pattern match.

Property.name: Home
Property.Description: Person's home address. This uses an embedded object.

Property.name: Office
Property.Description: Person's office address. This uses an embedded object.

Property.name: Spouse
Property.Description: Person's spouse. This is a reference to another persistent object.

Property.name: FavoriteColors
Property.Description: A collection of strings representing the person's favorite colors.

Property.name: Age
Property.Description:
Person's age.
This is a calculated field whose value is derived from DOB.

Method.name: CurrentAge
Method.Description: This class method calculates a current age given a date of birth <var>date</var>.

Method.name: PrintPerson
Method.Description: Prints the property <property>Name</property> to the console.

Method.name: Addition
Method.Description: A simple, sample method: add two numbers (<var>x</var> and <var>y</var>) and return the result.

Method.name: NinetyNine
Method.Description: A simple, sample expression method: returns the value 99.

Method.name: PrintPersons
Method.Description: Invoke the <method>PrintPerson</method> on all <class>Person</class> objects within the database.

Method.name: PrintPersonsSQL
Method.Description: Prints out data on all persons within the database using SQL to iterate over all the person data.

Method.name: StoredProcTest
Method.Description:
This is a sample of how to define an SQL stored procedure using a class method. This method can be called as a stored procedure via ODBC or JDBC.
In this case this method returns the concatenation of a string value.

Method.name: UpdateProcTest
Method.Description:
This is a sample of how to define an SQL stored procedure using a class method. This method can be called as a stored procedure via ODBC or JDBC.
This method performs an SQL update operation on the database using embedded SQL. The update modifies the embedded properties Home.City and Home.State for all rows whose Home.Zip is equal to zip.

Query.name: ByName
Query.Description:
A sample class query that defines a result set that returns Person data ordered by Name.
This query can be used within another Caché method (using the %ResultSet class), from Java, or from ActiveX.
This query is also accessible from ODBC and/or JDBC as the SQL stored procedure SP_Sample_By_Name.
Query.SqlQuery: SELECT ID, Name, DOB, SSN FROM Sample.Person WHERE (Name %STARTSWITH :name) ORDER BY Name
